title: Portuguese Paella with Roasted Tomatoes
description: A traditional Portuguese-inspired paella recipe featuring roasted tomatoes for added depth of flavor.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large paella pan over medium heat.
Add the chorizo and cook, breaking it up with a spoon, until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the garlic, smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper, and cook for 1 minute.
Add the roasted tomatoes and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Add the saffron rice, stirring to coat the rice in the oil and mix with the chorizo and tomato mixture.
Add 2 cups of water to the pan and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20 minutes.
Add the red bell pepper to the pan and continue to simmer for an additional 5 minutes.
Remove from heat and let rest for 5 minutes before serving.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley if desired.
